sourceOfTruth.rule: Describes the target operating model; never count as shipped implementation proof.
Ranks gaps and sequencing; refresh with current repo evidence before planning implementation.
Defines active AOS remediation work, ownership lanes, dependencies, and validation gates.

sourceOfTruth.path: code, tests, CI runs, and generated evidence artifacts
sourceOfTruth.rule: Only merged code, passing checks, and evidence artifacts prove capability is implemented.

lanes.label: aos-trust-spine
lanes.scope: API boundaries, governance defaults, public sharing, supply chain, auth state, and security headers.

lanes.label: aos-execution-spine
lanes.scope: Durable approvals, runner contracts, typed actions, workflow DAGs, watchers, worker priority, and concurrency.

lanes.label: aos-intelligence-fabric
lanes.scope: Context provenance, execution provenance, streamed state, and continuous governance simulation.

lanes.label: aos-shell
lanes.scope: Operator dashboard decomposition and migration discipline.

baselineCommands.command: git fetch origin --prune && git rev-list --left-right --count origin/main...HEAD
baselineCommands.purpose: Record branch freshness before starting or closing a remediation slice.

baselineCommands.command: gh issue list --repo leonardwongly/agentic --search 'AOS- in:title' --state open --limit 100
baselineCommands.purpose: Confirm GitHub tracker coverage for AOS-00 through AOS-18.
Capture current runtime capability maturity without treating the strategic plan as implementation proof.
Capture the raw supply-chain risk snapshot.
Evaluate production dependency risk against the repo exception policy.
Run deterministic unit and integration regression coverage.
Run the high-signal security abuse and boundary regression suite.
Prevent drift from the decomposition and durable execution boundaries.
Run performance sanity checks for request-path and worker-runtime assumptions.
Verify web and worker packages still compile.

items.title: Establish remediation baseline and tracking
validationGates: gh issue list --search 'AOS-' confirms tracker coverage
npm run test:smoke:capabilities captures current runtime maturity
npm audit --json captures current supply-chain risk

items.title: Add governed route wrapper for mutating APIs
validationGates: Targeted route tests for every migrated endpoint
Manual review that all external inputs are validated at the boundary

items.title: Move approval side-effect execution into durable jobs
validationGates: Regression tests for duplicate approval callback delivery
Failure injection test for worker crash after approval decision
Integration test verifies one external side effect for repeated approval

items.title: Make governance defaults conformant by default
validationGates: Abuse tests for public sharing and autonomous execution disabled by default

items.title: Add public share disclosure review
validationGates: Public share route tests for redaction and expiry
Security regression tests for token guessing and revoked access
Accessibility check for share review UI

items.title: Resolve supply-chain audit and pin CI provenance
validationGates: npm audit --json exits within accepted policy

items.title: Move shared auth runtime tables into migrations
validationGates: DB migration tests for fresh and existing databases

items.title: Apply uniform API security headers
validationGates: API regression tests for error paths
Manual grep review for raw Response.json usage

items.title: Introduce typed agent runner contracts
validationGates: Abuse tests for unauthorized capability claims

items.title: Expand typed action intents and driver enforcement
validationGates: Driver negative tests for unsupported fields

items.title: Add workflow DAG process model
validationGates: Concurrency tests for duplicate worker delivery

items.title: Build watcher daemon scheduler with dry-run mode
Add worker job priority and concurrency controls
validationGates: Worker runtime tests for priority ordering and lease expiry
Failure injection for timeout and dead-letter paths
Performance sanity for large queue scans

items.title: Add context packet provenance service
validationGates: Memory route tests for policy filtering

items.title: Build queryable execution provenance graph
validationGates: Performance sanity for large graph traversal

items.title: Replace job polling with event-streamed updates
validationGates: API tests for auth and reconnect behavior
Load sanity for concurrent stream connections

items.title: Split dashboard into maintainable OS surfaces
Add continuous governance simulation and autonomy calibration
validationGates: CI/report output with measurable decision quality metrics
